---
title: ""
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
# Locate the project root INDEPENDENTLY of the working directory, then load the
# CV helpers. Positron/Quarto may render with the working dir set to the page
# folder, the project root, or the workspace root *above* the project — so we
# can't just walk up from getwd(). Prefer Quarto's QUARTO_PROJECT_DIR, then the
# .qmd's own location, then the working dir.
.find_root <- function() {
  walk_up <- function(start) {
    d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
    for (i in 1:12) {
      if (file.exists(file.path(d, "_quarto.yml"))) {
        return(d)
      }
      p <- dirname(d)
      if (p == d) {
        break
      }
      d <- p
    }
    NULL
  }
  pd <- Sys.getenv("QUARTO_PROJECT_DIR", "")
  if (nzchar(pd) && file.exists(file.path(pd, "_quarto.yml"))) {
    return(pd)
  }
  ci <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE), error = function(e) "")
  if (nzchar(ci)) {
    r <- walk_up(dirname(normalizePath(ci, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)))
    if (!is.null(r)) return(r)
  }
  r <- walk_up(getwd())
  if (!is.null(r)) r else getwd()
}
.root <- .find_root()
options(cvsite_root = .root)
source(file.path(.root, "R", "cv-helpers.R"))
```

## Citations

_Updated: March 2026_

- [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/J-7051-2013): 1,153 (h-index = 10)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8AO7H9gAAAAJ&hl=en): 3,845 (h-index = 18, i10-index = 20)
- [Sage Policy Profiles](https://policyprofiles.sagepub.com/profile/21087/ben-stanley): 64 citations across 52 policy documents.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
# Single source of truth: the same cv/cv.yml that builds cv/cv.pdf. Sections
# appear in CV order (Monographs first) with the CV's own titles.
emit_publications()
```
